legacyDoNotUse.reason: Letter-substitution UDF; returns empty for valid input; not the 35-char hex format in production.

encryptedShape.description: Production encrypted SSN on CleanClaims is typically 35-char hex (see vwShowSSNsInClaimsNotEncrypted: len(ssn) between 1-34 = not encrypted).

cptsql20DirectAuth.note: Agent/sa cannot log in directly; use OPENQUERY from CPT2K16 or run encrypt on domain-joined workstation.

encryptInvoke.description: Parameterized SQL run on CPT2K16 (CPTMaster context). Must accept @plain (nvarchar) and return one row column encrypted (alias encrypted). Example: SELECT encrypted FROM OPENQUERY(CPTSQL20, '...') — set after CPTSQL20 spike.

updateRule.description: Remediation UPDATE must touch only the target SSN column and SSNEncryptedFix. No other CleanClaims columns.
